{{Quote|I don’t want any trouble, I’ll follow you.|Dalken Hol to Bossk|<ref name="FoC">''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''</ref>}}
'''Dalken Hol''' was an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. Some time after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Dalken was captured on [[Carida/Legends|Carida]] by [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] and turned over to the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]].

Bossk managed to defeat the academy's notable defense corps, which included a unit of [[Lancet Aerial Artillery]], and the possible destruction of a set of [[Barracks/Legends|barracks]] and a vehicle factory.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' {{1st}}
